Class StandardSerializer

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.serialization.standard.StandardSerializer
All Implemented Interfaces:
YamlSerializer
public class StandardSerializer extends Object implements YamlSerializer
Standard serializer.

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_SERIALIZED_TYPE_KEY

      public static final String DEFAULT_SERIALIZED_TYPE_KEY
      Default key for serialized class identifier. Used by the default serializer defaultSerializer.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • StandardSerializer

      public StandardSerializer(@NotNull Object serializedTypeKey)
      Creates a serializer.
      Parameters:
      serializedTypeKey - the key for serialized class identifier

  • Method Details

    • register

      public <T> void register(@NotNull Class<T> clazz, @NotNull TypeAdapter<T> adapter)
      Registers the given type for serialization. The type now will be recognizable by its full classname (e.g. me.name.project.objects.Custom).

      If you also want to set an alias (maybe for compatibility reasons), please use register(String, Class) afterwards.

      Type Parameters:
      T - type to register
      Parameters:
      clazz - the class of the type to register
      adapter - adapter for the type

    • register

      public <T> void register(@NotNull String alias, @NotNull Class<T> clazz)
      Registers the specified alias for the given type (represented by the class).

      The type must already be registered.

      Type Parameters:
      T - type to register
      Parameters:
      alias - alias for the class to register
      clazz - the class to register

    • deserialize

      @Nullable public Object deserialize(@NotNull Map<Object,Object> map)
      Description copied from interface: YamlSerializer
      Attempts to deserialize the given map into a class instance using this serializer.

      The given map is a raw object map - there are no Block instances, just the values themselves.

      If the serializer does not recognize the map, or could not deserialize the map, this method must return null.

      Specified by:
      deserialize in interface YamlSerializer
      Parameters:
      map - the raw map to deserialize
      Returns:
      the deserialized object

    • serialize

      @Nullable public <T> Map<Object,Object> serialize(@NotNull T object, @NotNull MapSupplier supplier)
      Description copied from interface: YamlSerializer
      Attempts to serialize the given object into a map and returns it.

      The given object is guaranteed to be:

      1. of type contained within YamlSerializer.getSupportedClasses(),
      2. a sub-class of any of YamlSerializer.getSupportedParentClasses().
      Map supplier is provided to supply default map as configured in GeneralSettings.getDefaultMapSupplier(). Serializers should not use their own map implementations, they should return the map provided by the supplier.

      If could not serialize into a map, this method must return null.

      Specified by:
      serialize in interface YamlSerializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - type of the object to serialize
      Parameters:
      object - the object to serialize
      supplier - the supplier used to supply default maps
      Returns:
      the serialized object

    • getSupportedClasses

      @NotNull public Set<Class<?>> getSupportedClasses()
      Description copied from interface: YamlSerializer
      Returns a set of all explicitly defined classes this serializer supports and can (de-)serialize.

      The returned set cannot be null as indicated by the annotation.

      Specified by:
      getSupportedClasses in interface YamlSerializer
      Returns:
      the set of supported classes

    • getSupportedParentClasses

      @NotNull public Set<Class<?>> getSupportedParentClasses()
      Description copied from interface: YamlSerializer
      Returns a set of all parent classes (classes, interfaces...) instances of which this serializer supports and can (de-)serialize.

      The returned set cannot be null as indicated by the annotation.

      Specified by:
      getSupportedParentClasses in interface YamlSerializer
      Returns:
      the set of supported parent classes

    • getDefault

      public static StandardSerializer getDefault()
      Returns the default serializer, which uses DEFAULT_SERIALIZED_TYPE_KEY.
      Returns:
      the default serializer
